Index.meta_title: NomadPixels AI - Create stunning AI images and videos in seconds
Index.meta_description: NomadPixels AI is an AI content studio for Mongolia — generate images with Flux and videos with Wan 2.2, pay with QPay, SocialPay, or your bank card.

Hero.title: Create stunning <important>AI images & videos</important> in seconds.
Hero.description: NomadPixels AI turns your ideas into images (Flux) and videos (Wan 2.2), running on rented GPU power — with payment in QPay, SocialPay, and Mongolian bank cards.

Features.section_title: Everything you need to create AI content
Features.section_description: From a text prompt to a finished image or video — fast, affordable, and built for Mongolian creators.
Features.feature_description: Generate, preview, and download your AI content directly from your dashboard.

Pricing.section_description: Buy credits and spend them on image or video generations — no subscription required.

FAQ.question: What models does NomadPixels AI use?
FAQ.answer: Images are generated with Flux (schnell) and videos with Wan 2.2, both run on rented RunPod GPU infrastructure.

CTA.title: Ready to create?
CTA.description: Start generating AI images and videos in minutes.

SignIn.meta_description: Sign in to your NomadPixels AI account.

DashboardLayout.meta_description: Generate, manage, and download your AI images and videos.

DashboardIndexPage.message_state_description: Start a new image or video generation from the Create page.
DashboardIndexPage.max_message: Need more credits? Check out our pricing page.

CreatePage.title_bar_description: Generate an AI image (Flux) or video (Wan 2.2)
CreatePage.prompt_placeholder: Describe what you want to see...
CreatePage.queued: Queued, waiting for a GPU worker...
CreatePage.flux_not_configured: Image generation isn't fully configured yet — the Flux workflow file is missing.
CreatePage.history_empty: Nothing generated yet — try creating your first image or video above.

BillingPage.title_bar_description: Buy a credit package and use it for image and video generations
BillingPage.scan_instruction: Scan this QR with your QPay app to pay
BillingPage.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

UserProfilePage.title_bar_description: View and manage your user profile
